commands.purpose: Load bead acceptance criteria, scope, and implementation context.
commands.observed_result: Bead fpde-cj3 is in_progress and acceptance criteria AK-1 through AK-8 match the requested AccountPraxisSchein and EncounterPraxis re-scope work.

commands.purpose: Check that ScheinNummer/Scheinart references were removed from Encounter profiles/examples and that the retired HZV extension is not used on EncounterPraxisHZV examples.
commands.observed_result: Matches remain only in AccountPraxisSchein profile/examples and in the retained retired extension definition; no EncounterPraxis or EncounterPraxisHZV usage of the old identifier/type slices or HZV extension remains in the touched examples.

commands.purpose: Compile the IG with SUSHI after the first implementation pass.
commands.observed_result: SUSHI summary showed 1 Error and 5 Warnings; the error was that StructureDefinition.deprecated is not an R4 element.

commands.purpose: Verify the final FSH implementation compiles with zero SUSHI errors.
commands.observed_result: SUSHI summary: 72 Profiles, 198 Extensions, 49 ValueSets, 55 CodeSystems, 234 Instances, 0 Errors, 5 Warnings. Warnings were pre-existing package/version/network warnings.

commands.purpose: Review changed and untracked files before committing.
commands.observed_result: Changed files are limited to the scoped FSH profiles, extension, examples, changelog, and required .beads run artifacts.

skipped_checks.reason: The bead explicitly requested SUSHI verification. SUSHI completed with 0 errors; IG Publisher was not required for this acceptance gate.

artifacts.description: Acceptance criteria mapping, changed files, tests, downstream impacts, and evidence references.
Command evidence, skipped checks, and generated artifact inventory.
